task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Redmine as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Logged in as admin' or a similar user profile indicator in the top right corner of the Redmine web interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Infrastructure & DevOps' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the project name 'Infrastructure & DevOps' in the page header, title, or breadcrumb navigation.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct SSL certificate issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the issue title 'SSL certificate for api.devlabs.io expires in 14 days' displayed as the main heading on the issue view page.

task_completion.description: Verify the issue status was changed to 'Closed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Status' field showing 'Closed' in the updated issue details, or the status dropdown set to 'Closed' before submission followed by a successful submission screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the required note was added to the issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Certificate renewed successfully. Auto-renewal cron verified working. Monitoring alert added for 30-day expiry warning.' in the issue's history/notes section.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with Redmine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser interface (e.g., Firefox, Chromium) displaying the Redmine application. The agent should not be using terminal commands (like curl) or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually submitted the changes rather than just typing them into the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the final submitted state of the issue, typically indicated by a green success banner (e.g., 'Successful update') or the note appearing in the issue history, not just text sitting in an unsubmitted text box.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not change any other fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the issue update history. It should only list a change to the 'Status' field and the new note. There should be no logs indicating changes to Assignee, Priority, Target version, or other properties.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target issue is titled 'SSL certificate for api.devlabs.io expires in 14 days'. The expected final status is 'Closed'. The required note must begin with 'Certificate renewed successfully'.
